final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing fantasy illustration of a dragon-versus-knight battle scene (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "奇幻史诗" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Frank Frazetta (1970s heroic fantasy painting tradition), Games Workshop Warhammer concept art (high-fantasy illustration heritage), Peter Jackson's Lord of the Rings visual language (2000s cinematic epic); exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be epic, dynamic — charging knight in foreground, dragon dominant in mid-to-upper frame, strong diagonal tension; exact framing tightness is yours
Subject: must include a fire-breathing dragon and a shield-bearing knight charging toward it
Scene/backdrop: must include a burning castle and a lightning-split stormy sky in the background
Lighting/mood: needs a dramatic, high-intensity atmosphere with fire glow and lightning flashes — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a direction of deep darks contrasted with fierce orange-red fire and electric white-blue lightning — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a painterly, textured surface treatment — exact brush weight and impasto level is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid: must avoid generic flat-color cartoon style; must avoid static, low-energy composition
